education.title: Electrical Engineering
education.description: Study of electrical systems, circuits, and devices. Focus on designing and analyzing electrical components and systems.

experience.title: Minecraft Mod Developer
experience.description:
• Created, designed, and programmed various free and open-source Minecraft mods downloaded by over 329 million players worldwide with over half million weekly downloads utilizing Forge and Fabric mod loaders in Java.
• Work on numerous teams to bring ideas and concepts to life.
• Provide support and address bugs reported by players.
• Design various libraries for other developers to optimize their development times.

experience.title: HCR Carrier
experience.description: Delivering mail and packages to customers in a timely and efficient manner. Responsible for sorting, organizing, and delivering mail.

experience.title: Java Developer
experience.description:
• Programmed engaging Minecraft mods for 100+ player YouTube video events watched by millions.
• Worked closely with a team to design, program, and add content to Minecraft. 
• Conducted gameplay testing and used JUnit Tests to validate and optimize intricate systems before recording.
• Leveraged Minecraft’s shader and OpenGL pipeline to create stunning visuals.

experience.title: Java Game Developer
experience.description: • Led a team to design and develop high-quality Minecraft YouTube videos viewed by millions.• Led hundreds of testing events involving hundreds of players, ensuring the quality and performance of videos.

highlights: Over 6 ½ years of experience designing and developing Minecraft mods using Java.
Over 468 million project downloads across my open-source projects.
Over 25 published YouTube videos for big content creators including MrBeast Gaming, SocksFor1, TommyInnit, and more! Garnering over
